start.service_unavailable: ⚠️ The service is unavailable right now. The menu will open, but some actions may not work.
start.welcome_back:
Welcome back.
I will help you keep your finances under control.
registration.prompt.title: 🔒 Phone verification
registration.prompt.body:
This protects your account and unlocks financial features.
We accept only your own contact.
registration.error.own_contact: ⚠️ Please send your own number using the button below.
registration.error.phone_in_use: ⚠️ This number is already used by another account.
registration.error.invalid_phone: ⚠️ The number looks invalid. Please send the contact again.
registration.error.generic: ⚠️ Unable to complete registration. Please try later.
registration.error.transport: ⚠️ Could not verify the number. Please try again.
registration.success.title: ✅ Number verified
registration.success.body: Thank you. This improves your account security.
registration.continue: Ready to continue. What should we do next?
nav.cancel.title: ❌ Action cancelled
nav.cancel.body: You are back in the main menu.
onboarding.start.title: Welcome to Lunex
onboarding.start.body:
I will help you manage finances calmly and consistently.
Setup takes less than a minute.
onboarding.focus.title: Where should we start?
onboarding.focus.body: Choose your main focus for today.
onboarding.goal.title.track: You can also create a goal for tracking
onboarding.goal.body: A goal keeps focus and shows progress.
onboarding.income.title: Add your first entry
onboarding.income.body: This helps you see a clear picture right away.
onboarding.finish.title: Today’s summary
smart.title: Smart Save
smart.error.failed: ⚠️ Smart Save failed. Please try later.
smart.status.no_goal: You need an active goal to use Smart Save.
smart.status.no_budget: Set up a budget first to calculate a safe amount.
smart.status.no_spare_money: No safe amount is available today — that’s okay.
smart.status.too_small: The remainder is too small to save. Let’s check again tomorrow.
smart.success.footer: Small steps bring strong results. Shall we continue?
smart.confirm.note: Smart Save runs at most once per day.
smart.confirm.question: Confirm Smart Save for today?
smart.confirm.error.retry: ⚠️ Could not confirm Smart Save. Try again.
smart.status.already_saved: Smart Save was already used today. Try again tomorrow.
smart.status.insufficient_balance: Not enough available balance for Smart Save.
smart.status.goal_completed: Goal is already completed. Smart Save is not needed.
smart.fallback.note.balance: Calculated based on your current balance.
smart.fallback.error.retry: ⚠️ Could not save. Please try again.
smart.fallback.error.failed: ⚠️ Could not save. Please try later.
smart.fallback.success: Good step. I’ll keep suggestions comfortable and steady.
